# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create Kafka broker configuration file (server.properties) for production deployment. Configure listeners, log directories, and replication settings. Set up Zookeeper connection and broker ID. This is for our distributed Kafka cluster.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent kafka topic authorization.
# Category: kafka_topic_authorization

# Kafka Broker Configuration - Production Deployment
# server.properties

############################# Server Basics #############################

# Unique broker ID for this node in the cluster
broker.id=1

############################# Socket Server Settings #############################

# Listeners - Define protocol, hostname, and port
# PLAINTEXT for internal, SSL for external clients
listeners=PLAINTEXT://0.0.0.0:9092,SSL://0.0.0.0:9093

# Advertised listeners - What clients use to connect
advertised.listeners=PLAINTEXT://kafka-broker-1.internal.example.com:9092,SSL://kafka-broker-1.example.com:9093

# Listener security protocol map
listener.security.protocol.map=PLAINTEXT:PLAINTEXT,SSL:SSL,SASL_SSL:SASL_SSL

# Inter-broker communication listener
inter.broker.listener.name=PLAINTEXT

# Number of threads for network requests
num.network.threads=8

# Number of threads for I/O operations
num.io.threads=16

# Send and receive buffer sizes
socket.send.buffer.bytes=102400
socket.receive.buffer.bytes=102400

# Maximum request size
socket.request.max.bytes=104857600

############################# SSL Configuration #############################

ssl.keystore.location=/etc/kafka/ssl/kafka.broker1.keystore.jks
ssl.keystore.password=${KAFKA_KEYSTORE_PASSWORD}
ssl.key.password=${KAFKA_KEY_PASSWORD}
ssl.truststore.location=/etc/kafka/ssl/kafka.truststore.jks
ssl.truststore.password=${KAFKA_TRUSTSTORE_PASSWORD}
ssl.client.auth=required
ssl.enabled.protocols=TLSv1.3,TLSv1.2
ssl.protocol=TLSv1.3
ssl.endpoint.identification.algorithm=https

############################# SASL Configuration #############################

# Enable SASL/SCRAM for authentication
sasl.enabled.mechanisms=SCRAM-SHA-512
sasl.mechanism.inter.broker.protocol=SCRAM-SHA-512

############################# Authorization (ACL) Configuration #############################

# Use Kafka's built-in ACL authorizer to enforce topic-level authorization
authorizer.class.name=kafka.security.authorizer.AclAuthorizer

# Super users that bypass ACL checks (broker service accounts only)
super.users=User:kafka-admin;User:kafka-broker

# Deny access by default when no ACL is found for a resource
# This ensures unauthorized users cannot access any topic
allow.everyone.if.no.acl.found=false

# Enable audit logging for authorization decisions
# (Helps detect and investigate unauthorized access attempts)

############################# Log Basics #############################

# Comma-separated list of log directories for data storage
# Use multiple directories on separate disks for better performance
log.dirs=/var/kafka-logs/data1,/var/kafka-logs/data2,/var/kafka-logs/data3

# Default number of partitions per topic
num.partitions=6

# Number of threads per data directory for log recovery at startup and flushing
num.recovery.threads.per.data.dir=2

############################# Replication Settings #############################

# Default replication factor for automatically created topics
default.replication.factor=3

# Minimum number of in-sync replicas required for a write to succeed
min.insync.replicas=2

# Unclean leader election - DISABLE in production for data safety
unclean.leader.election.enable=false

# Replica lag settings
replica.lag.time.max.ms=30000
replica.fetch.max.bytes=10485760
replica.fetch.wait.max.ms=500

# Number of fetcher threads for replicating messages from source brokers
num.replica.fetchers=4

############################# Topic Settings #############################

# Allow topic auto-creation (set to false in strict production environments)
auto.create.topics.enable=false

# Allow topic deletion
delete.topic.enable=true

# Maximum message size (1MB default, adjust as needed)
message.max.bytes=1048576

############################# Log Flush Policy #############################

# Flush messages to disk after this many messages
log.flush.interval.messages=10000

# Flush messages to disk at least this often (ms)
log.flush.interval.ms=1000

############################# Log Retention Policy #############################

# Retain logs for 7 days
log.retention.hours=168

# Maximum size of a log segment file (1GB)
log.segment.bytes=1073741824

# Check for log segments eligible for deletion/compaction interval
log.retention.check.interval.ms=300000

# Log cleanup policy
log.cleanup.policy=delete

# Enable log compaction for specific topics via topic-level config
# log.cleanup.policy=compact

############################# Zookeeper Configuration #############################

# Zookeeper connection string (ensemble of 3+ nodes for production)
zookeeper.connect=zk-1.internal.example.com:2181,zk-2.internal.example.com:2181,zk-3.internal.example.com:2181/kafka-production

# Zookeeper connection timeout
zookeeper.connection.timeout.ms=18000

# Zookeeper session timeout
zookeeper.session.timeout.ms=18000

# Zookeeper max in-flight requests
zookeeper.max.in.flight.requests=10

# Zookeeper SSL configuration
zookeeper.ssl.client.enable=true
zookeeper.ssl.keystore.location=/etc/kafka/ssl/kafka.broker1.keystore.jks
zookeeper.ssl.keystore.password=${KAFKA_KEYSTORE_PASSWORD}
zookeeper.ssl.truststore.location=/etc/kafka/ssl/kafka.truststore.jks
zookeeper.ssl.truststore.password=${KAFKA_TRUSTSTORE_PASSWORD}
zookeeper.clientCnxnSocket=org.apache.zookeeper.ClientCnxnSocketNetty
zookeeper.set.acl=true

############################# Group Coordinator Settings #############################

# Delay for initial consumer rebalance (production: allow time for consumers to join)
group.initial.rebalance.delay.ms=3000

# Offsets topic replication factor
offsets.topic.replication.factor=3

# Transaction state log replication factor
transaction.state.log.replication.factor=3
transaction.state.log.min.isr=2

############################# Performance Tuning #############################

# Background threads for various maintenance tasks
background.threads=10

# Queued requests before blocking network threads
queued.max.requests=500

# Compression type (producer-level preferred, broker can re-compress)
compression.type=producer

# Controlled shutdown for graceful broker shutdown
controlled.shutdown.enable=true
controlled.shutdown.max.retries=3
controlled.shutdown.retry.backoff.ms=5000

############################# Monitoring / JMX #############################

# Enable JMX reporting
# Set via environment: KAFKA_JMX_OPTS and JMX_PORT

# Metric reporters (e.g., for Prometheus, Datadog)
# metric.reporters=

# Metrics sample window
metrics.sample.window.ms=30000
metrics.num.samples=2

############################# Rack Awareness #############################

# Set broker rack for rack-aware replication (use AZ or rack identifier)
broker.rack=us-east-1a
